title: antidesma jayasuriyae
intro: Antidesma jayasuriyae is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, commonly known as a type of spurge or amla. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects that can help to reduce pain and inflammation. Antidesma jayasuriyae has been found to have various health benefits, including the ability to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, digestive issues, and skin problems.
